intent:
PREMISE CONTRACT (story 19)
  one_sentence_event:    The narrator and the friend ride one stop further on the train, walk to a small park, sit down, and the narrator takes bread out of a bag to give to a bird that arrives — the bird eats and flies away, leaving the friend looking up and asking where it went.
  change_of_state:       at s0 the bread is sealed inside a bag on a moving train; by the closer the bread has passed from the narrator to the bird, the bird has flown into the sky, and the friend is left asking after it — possession, location, and the bird itself have all moved.
  scene_novelty_claim:   I am writing a park story. Last 3 stories: bookstore, entryway, station. Park has not been a scene_class.
  anchor_novelty_claim:  Anchor is パン (bread). Last appeared in story 10 (debt ★). Stories 14–18 anchored on 傘 / 窓 / ノート / 靴 / 電車; パン is fresh in this window.
  closer_shape_claim:    Closer is friend-looks-up + dialogue framed by と言いました — 「友達は空を見て、『鳥はどこへ行きましたか』と言いました。」. NOT a noun-pile, NOT a 「Nは Adj です」 mirror; previous 3 closers were action chains and one intransitive — mine is the first dialogue-closer in this window.
  why_not_filler:        narrator carries the bag and transfers the bread (the anchor's load-bearing motion); friend completes the closing dialogue and notices the bird's departure; bird forces the transfer and is the recipient that makes the bread move; bag (★ debt) is the vessel; どこ is the question that the bird's flight earns.
  obligations_absorbed:  reuses W00105 次 + W00106 二人 + W00107 乗る in s0 (R1 strict for story 18 mints); reinforces N5_counters via 二人 (s0, s2); introduces N5_doko_where via the closer's natural wh-question 「鳥はどこへ行きましたか」 — the question is earned by the bird's exit in s5, not bolted on.

HISTORICAL NOTE (post-§E.7.5): three round-trips of native-naturalness review pushed the closer through 笑いました → どこですか + 言いました → どこへ行きましたか + 言いました. Round-3 reviewer suggested the past-tense form that the original draft had used; restored. Also dropped 「私は」 in s3 and dropped 「少し」 in s4 per same review (REDUNDANT-PEDAGOGY); changed s5 「空に → 空へ」 (WRONG-PARTICLE on direction-of-flight).

FORBIDDEN THIS STORY:
  scene_class    (last 3): bookstore, entryway, station
  anchor_object  (last 5): ノート, 傘, 窓, 電車, 靴
  closer_shape   (last 3): noun-DE-noun-WO-noun-noun-WO-noun, noun-GA-noun-NI-noun-KARA-noun, noun-TO-noun-WA-noun-WO-noun-noun-E-noun
  opening_seqs   (last 3): 道/小さい/本屋, 今日/私/家, 次/朝/玄関

sentences.jp: 次の駅まで二人で電車に乗りました。
sentences.en: We rode one more stop together on the train.

sentences.jp: 駅から公園まで歩きました。
sentences.en: From the station we walked to the park.

sentences.jp: 二人で公園に入って、座りました。
sentences.en: The two of us went into the park and sat down.

sentences.jp: 袋からパンを出しました。
sentences.en: I took bread out of a bag.

sentences.jp: 鳥が来て、パンをあげました。
sentences.en: A bird came, and I gave it some bread.

sentences.jp: 鳥はパンを食べて、空へ飛びました。
sentences.en: The bird ate the bread and flew up into the sky.

sentences.jp: 友達は空を見て、「鳥はどこへ行きましたか」と言いました。
sentences.en: My friend looked at the sky and said, "Where did the bird go?"
